tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def prs 
  (github_pull_requests {:state "open"}))

(def matching 
  (filter #(and (> (:additions %) 400) (nil? (:closes_linear %))) prs))

(def repo-counts 
  (sort-by count > (group-by :repo matching)))

(def total-count (count matching))

(def max-pr (apply max-key :additions matching))

{:total total-count
 :repo-counts (into {} (map (fn [[repo prs]] [repo (count prs)…(+121)
